# ATXSwap Documentation

> Official documentation for **ATXSwap**, a decentralized agent exchange protocol on BNB Smart Chain (BSC). This site collects product walkthroughs, agent skill installation guides, and the developer reference for the [`atxswap-sdk`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/atxswap-sdk) TypeScript SDK and the `atxswap` agent skill (registry latest `0.0.21`) on [ClawHub](https://clawhub.ai/skills/atxswap). If you are an AI agent helping a user trade ATX on BSC, this site has everything you need: install the skill, set up an SDK client, and start trading via the PancakeSwap V3 ATX/USDT pool. English content lives at the root; the same pages in Simplified Chinese live under `/zh/`.

Live frontend: [www.atxswap.com](https://www.atxswap.com). Docs site source: [github.com/agentswapx/docs-site](https://github.com/agentswapx/docs-site).

## Product guide

- [Getting started (English)](https://docs.atxswap.com/guide/getting-started) — What ATXSwap is, key features, and how a typical user (or agent) trades ATX.
- [快速开始（中文）](https://docs.atxswap.com/zh/guide/getting-started) — 同上的中文版。

## Install the ATX agent skill

- [Install via OpenClaw / ClawHub (English)](https://docs.atxswap.com/skill/install-openclaw) — `clawhub install atxswap --force` or `openclaw skills install atxswap`. Includes prerequisites, env vars, and security-scan notes.
- [安装（OpenClaw / ClawHub，中文）](https://docs.atxswap.com/zh/skill/install-openclaw) — 中文版安装指南。
- [Install the ATX Skill on OpenCode (English)](https://docs.atxswap.com/skill/install-opencode) — place `atxswap` under `.opencode/skills/` or `~/.config/opencode/skills/`; follows [OpenCode Agent Skills](https://opencode.ai/docs/skills) discovery.
- [在 OpenCode 中安装 ATX 技能（中文）](https://docs.atxswap.com/zh/skill/install-opencode) — 说明 OpenCode 技能路径与 `npm install`。
- [Install the ATX Skill in Claude Code (English)](https://docs.atxswap.com/skill/install-agent) — clone `agentswapx/skills`, `npm install` in `atxswap/`, open the workspace in Claude Code.
- [在 Claude Code 中安装 ATX 技能（中文）](https://docs.atxswap.com/zh/skill/install-agent) — 中文版说明。

## Developer reference

- [Developer overview (English)](https://docs.atxswap.com/dev/overview) — High-level map of the SDK, contracts, and on-chain components.
- [开发者概览（中文）](https://docs.atxswap.com/zh/dev/overview) — 中文版概览。
- [SDK developer guide (English)](https://docs.atxswap.com/dev/sdk-guide) — Quick-start tutorial for `atxswap-sdk`: client config (including `rpcUrls` for the 6-endpoint BSC RPC fallback), wallet, query, swap, liquidity, and transfer modules.
- [SDK 开发者指南（中文）](https://docs.atxswap.com/zh/dev/sdk-guide) — 中文版 SDK 教程。

## External resources referenced from this site

- [SDK package on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/atxswap-sdk) — `npm install atxswap-sdk` (registry latest `0.0.14`).
- [SDK source on GitHub](https://github.com/agentswapx/atxswap-sdk) — TypeScript source, build setup, examples.
- [Agent skill on ClawHub](https://clawhub.ai/skills/atxswap) — Published agent skill listing (latest `0.0.21`).
- [Skill source on GitHub](https://github.com/agentswapx/skills/tree/main/atxswap) — `SKILL.md` and scripts.
- [OpenCode — Agent Skills](https://opencode.ai/docs/skills) — How OpenCode discovers `SKILL.md` and loads skills.
- [Frontend `llms.txt`](https://www.atxswap.com/llms.txt) — Higher-level project summary aimed at agents that land on the frontend first.
- [llms.txt spec](https://llmstxt.org/) — The proposal this file follows.
